title: juncus glaucus var. equisetosus
intro: Juncus glaucus var. equisetosus, also known as Equisetum, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the horsetail family (Equisetaceae). Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Equisetum is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The plant has been used to treat conditions such as arthritis, gout, and urinary tract infections due to its diuretic and antimicrobial properties. Equisetum can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it has also been used in poultices and compresses to aid in wound healing and reduce swelling.
